name: bird-mood-nfc
description: 今日鸟签 NFC 小程序原型与 H5 预览

scripts.build: node scripts/convert_bird_webp.mjs && node scripts/export_h5_birds.mjs && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/assets dist/web/assets/meta && cp index.html styles.css script.js dist/ && cp -R assets/birds-final dist/assets/ && cp -R assets/birds-final-webp dist/assets/ && cp -R web/assets/meta/birds.json dist/web/assets/meta/
